seoTitle: Hurlstone Park vs Hurstville Grove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hurlstone Park and Hurstville Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hurlstone Park vs Hurstville Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hurlstone Park and Hurstville Grove.
heading: Hurlstone Park vs Hurstville Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hurlstone Park, New South Wales and Hurstville Grove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hurstville Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Hurlstone Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hurlstone Park or Hurstville Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hurlstone Park has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Hurstville Grove scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hurlstone Park scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Hurstville Grove scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hurlstone Park or Hurstville Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hurstville Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
